fix.description: Blur reworked exactly per your reviewReply + verified live (see 3-shot montage). The WHOLE build page is blurred and ONLY the top coach section is sharp; 'I'll build it myself' is overlaid on the blur (BuildFocusOverlay: fixed inset-0 backdrop-blur-xl, portalled to body so the full page blurs under the transformed onboarding container). Uniform across both pages — Workout & Meals share the identical overlay; Meals additionally keeps the calories/protein/carbs/fat MacroTargetBars SHARP under the coach card (this tick fixed the missing unblurredExtra slot). Old 2-path 'How should we build your plan' screen removed (always-custom). Building screen is multi-voice (Profile Analyst/Nutrition Engine/Training Coordinator/Meal Planner/Safety Validator/Plan Assembler) with sedentary step-cap + safe-pace notes. Plan-ready uses the coach-profile-card style with a single Continue revealed on scroll. App commit c1e6edfe.

history.note: nice complete what's left in. my query

previousFix.description: Root cause: BuildFocusOverlay used bg-background/55 (too opaque) making the builder invisible behind; 'I'll build myself' was sequential below the coach card, not overlaid on the blur. Fix: changed to backdrop-blur-xl + bg-background/8 so the builder is clearly visible but blurred; flex-1 flex wrapper centres 'I'll build myself' button in the blurred area below the coach card. Also fixed sedentary step goal (was 10k, now uses activity-level-derived target). Screenshot: entire page blurred, coach card sharp at top, 'I'll build myself' centred on blurred builder content.

Redesigned PlanReadyOverview to img-4 coach-profile-card style: checkmark title + YOUR COACH card (avatar, persona tagline) + big kcal Daily Target + 3-column macro grid (PROTEIN/CARBS/FAT with grams/% /mini bars) + weekly pace + scroll-reveal Continue CTA. BuildFocusOverlay full-page blur + I'll build it myself button (inc 2) confirmed correct.

previousFix.description: Expanded the Help & FAQ to comprehensively cover every feature. It now has 15 categories and 46 articles: Getting Around, Nutrition & Diet, Tracking, Workouts, Progress & Insights, Social & Partners, Achievements, Personal Coach (AI), Plan Management, Wellness, Notifications, Subscription, Account, Data & Privacy, and Troubleshooting — covering onboarding, dashboard, meal logging/swaps/macros, weight & measurements, workouts/progressive-overload/PRs, Health Score, weekly review, body composition, friends/leaderboards/partner groups, XP/levels/badges, goal change/pause/weekly updates, wellness check-ins, notifications, Health Connect sync, offline, and more. Screenshot shows the expanded list live on the FAQ screen. Note: the backend also has two leftover 'test'/'test2' help categories — those are backend data you can remove from the admin content panel whenever; the app content itself is now comprehensive.

SEO articles live on nyus.in: 15 exercise form guides (barbell bench press, deadlift, squat, pull-up, row, curls, lunges, plank + 11 more), 3 fitness articles (protein, progressive overload, body composition), 5 high-protein meal recipes. Exercise images served via HTTPS /uploads/ proxy on nginx. Sitemap updated. All pages indexed with schema.org Article/Recipe markup + GA4.
